productDisplayName: Van Heusen Men Travelite Pleated Navy Blue Trousers
description: Composition Navy blue formal trousers, made of 67% terylene, 30% rayon and 3% XLA blended fabric, has a comfortable stretch fabric, invisible elasticity around the waist, nylon gripper waistband, flat front with insert two pockets on the sides and a zipped inner vault pocket, two buttoned welt pockets at the back, metal zipped and button closure, pleats on the front and extendable hems Fit Comfort fit Regular rise Wash care Machine wash with like colours in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron Use professional laundering for best care These formal trousers from the van heusen Travelite collection will make you the most sophisticated-looking, sort after man at any gathering. Made from the choicest fabrics, they are perfectly fitted for office wear and any other formal occasion when you want to look your best without too much effort. The stretch fabric keeps you comfy all day, the nylon gripper on the waistband keeps your shirt securely tucked in and the zipped vault secret pocket keeps your cards safe when on the move. Pair them with a crisp formal shirt and leather shoes. Model statistics The product is a size 34 on a model of height 6' and waist 34"
